name: card
title: Card
description: A surface container with header, content, and footer slots.
a11y: Cards are divs — add a role if needed (e.g. role="article" for standalone content cards).
CardTitle renders an h3 — adjust heading level to fit the document outline.

do: Use Card to group related content on a surface.
Use CardFooter for primary actions related to the card.
dont: Don't nest cards more than one level deep.
